Rythmos® Door Bell

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Visitor alerts
One-press trigger
Wireless install

Overview

Rythmos® Door Bell is a wireless visitor notification solution built on the Rythmos® wearable platform. It uses a mounted push-button to alert staff when someone is at a secured entrance or door.

FUNCTIONS

Triggers visitor notification alert
Routes alerts through Rythmos® mesh network
Identifies specific entry location
Supports managed visitor workflows

Key Capabilities

Visitor
Notification

Staff
alerting when someone is ringing

Simple
Interaction

Single
button press to trigger alert

Location
Awareness

Identifies
specific door or entry point

Wireless
Deployment

No
wiring required for installation

Low
Maintenance

Battery-powered
and easy to manage

Hardware Specifications

Power Source: CR2430 coin cell battery
Battery Life: Up to 5 months (usage dependent)
Indicators: LED visual indicator
Mounting: Surface-mounted enclosure
Network: Rythmos® Mesh (Wirepas)
Management: Care Manager (web + mobile)

System & Safety Features

Real-time alert delivery: Immediate notification to staff devices

Entry workflow support: Helps manage controlled access points

Centralized visibility: All alerts tracked in Rythmos® Care Manager platform

Event logging: Maintains history of visitor activity

Scalable deployment: Supports multiple doors and entry points

Reliable system integration: Supports multiple doors and entry points

System Topology — Door Bell Deployment

Button press triggers an alert that is transmitted through the Rythmos® mesh network to the Care Manager, notifying staff of a visitor at the door.

Installation Guidelines

Placement

- Install near doors or secured entries
- Position within easy reach

Environment

- Indoor use recommended
- Avoid direct exposure to moisture

Mounting

- Mount enclosure to wall or surface
- Ensure stable and secure placement

Battery

- Replace batteries as needed
- Monitor battery status via platform

Cleaning

- Wipe with dry cloth
- Avoid liquids entering device

Care

- Ensure button responsiveness
- Check LED functionality

intrexis.com
